home.massageAreas: Comprehensive Massage Solutions for Every Body Part
home.massageAreasDesc: Our electric massagers are designed to target specific body areas, providing effective relief from pain, tension, and fatigue. From head to foot, we offer specialized massage solutions for optimal wellness.
home.headMassageDesc: Relieve tension headaches and migraines with targeted head massage therapy. Perfect for office workers and those experiencing stress-related head pain.
home.neckShoulderMassageDesc: Combat neck stiffness and shoulder tension caused by prolonged sitting and poor posture. Our neck massagers provide deep, therapeutic relief.
home.eyeMassageDesc: Reduce eye strain and fatigue from screen time with gentle eye massage. Ideal for professionals spending long hours at computers.
home.waistMassageDesc: Alleviate lower back pain and lumbar tension with targeted waist massage. Essential for those with sedentary lifestyles or back problems.
home.calfMassageDesc: Reduce leg fatigue and muscle soreness after long standing or exercise. Improve blood circulation in your lower legs.
home.footMassageDesc: Relieve foot pain and soreness with therapeutic foot massage. Perfect for athletes, travelers, and anyone on their feet all day.

about.title: About Aojiang Tech
about.subtitle: Leading manufacturer of professional electric massagers for B2B clients
about.whoWeAreDesc1: Wenzhou Aojiang Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. is a specialized manufacturer of small electric massagers, dedicated to providing high-quality wellness products to B2B clients worldwide.
about.whoWeAreDesc2: Founded with a vision to revolutionize the massage therapy industry, we combine innovative design with reliable manufacturing to deliver products that exceed customer expectations.
about.whoWeAreDesc3: Our commitment to excellence is reflected in our annual export volume of over $6.3 million and our partnerships with well-known international brands.
about.pricing: Competitive pricing with bulk order discounts
about.whyChooseUsDesc: Our commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction sets us apart
about.globalReachDesc: Exporting to over 50 countries worldwide with consistent quality standards
about.industryRecognitionDesc: Verified by SGS Group - world-leading inspection and certification company
about.expertTeamDesc: Dedicated professionals with years of experience in product development
about.qualityAssuranceDesc: Rigorous testing and quality control at every stage of production
about.certificationsDesc: We maintain the highest standards of quality and compliance
about.missionDesc: To provide innovative, high-quality electric massage solutions that enhance wellness and improve quality of life for people worldwide, while maintaining the highest standards of manufacturing excellence and customer service.
